zh.Felmersham, Bedfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾費爾莫沙安
zh.lifeSummary: Simon Tapp於1485年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾費爾莫沙安。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1536年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

zh-hans.Felmersham, Bedfordshire, England: 英国英格兰貝德福爾費爾莫沙安
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Simon Tapp于1485年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾費爾莫沙安。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1536年在他的家乡享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tapp
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the early Middle English personal name Tapp (Old English Tæppa). The unrecorded Old English personal name is thought to be the first element of the placenames Taplow (Buckinghamshire), Tapners (Kent), Tappington (Kent), and Tapton (Derbyshire). See also Taplin .
English: possibly a nickname from Middle English tape ‘ribbon, tape’, or tappe ‘plug, tap’; ‘tap, knock’.

variants.name: Tappe
meanings: North German: metonymic occupational name for the owner of a tavern, a beer or wine tapper, from Middle Low German tappe ‘tap’.
English: variant of   Tapp  . This surname has now died out in Britain.

variants.name: Taplin
meanings: probably from Middle English Tolpayn, which may be a nickname for a miller, from Middle English tollen ‘to exact a charge on (something)’ + Middle English (Old French) pain ‘bread’, though the tolls that the miller exacted were on the flour he ground not the bread that was made from it. Alternatively, if -payne is a spelling of Middle English (Old French) peine ‘tax’, it may instead be a nickname for a tax collector.

variants.name: Tapscott
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from a lost Devon placename, perhaps in or near Barnstaple, recorded as Tappyscote in 1504–15. The placename may derive from an early Middle English personal name Tapp (Old English Tæppa), genitive Tappes, + Middle English cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’, but this cannot be certain due to a lack of medieval forms. See also Tapp for the Middle English personal name Tapp, which is most frequent in Devon.

nameMeanings.name: Simon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

variants.name: Simen
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

en.lifeSummary: Simon Tapp was born in 1485, in Felmersham, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1536, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Simon Tapp est né en 1485, à Felmersham, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1536, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Simon Tapp wurde 1485 in Felmersham, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1536 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Simon Tapp è nato il nel 1485 nel Felmersham, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1536, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Simon Tapp(은)는 1485년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 프머샤에서 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1536년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Simon Tapp nasceu em 1485, em Felmersham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1536, em sua cidade natal, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Simon Tapp родился в 1485 г. в местности фелмиршам, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1536 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Simon Tapp nació en 1485, en Felmersham, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1536, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
